Metcalfe, Charles, s. Thomas, of Banbury, Oxon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 Nov., 1666, aged 16.
Luscombe, John, s. Isaac, of Diptford, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1666, aged 18.

Blagrave, Jonathan, s. John, of 'University of Oxford,' gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 Dec., 1667, aged 15; B.A. from Magdalen Hall 1671, M.A. 1674, rector of Longworth, Berks, 1681, chaplain in ordinary and sub-almoner to Queen Mary, canon of Worcester 1690, until his death 30 Aug., 1698. See Fasti, ii. 344. [Addenda: D.D. Lambeth 27 March, 1696.]

Wilkins, Joseph, s. Fr., of Great Gaddesden, Herts, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 15; B.A. from Gloucester Hall 1671; M.A. from Balliol Coll. 1674; served the donative of Patteswicke, Essex, 1677, rector of Angle or Nangle, co. Pembroke, 1685. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Pearce, Francis, s. Peter, of Honiton, Devon, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 March, 1667, aged 18 (subscribes 'serviens'); B.A. 1670, M.A. 1674 (as Pierce), rector of Churchill 1671, and vicar of Halesowen 1676, and rector of Rushock 1688, all co. Worcester. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Hughes, John, s. William, of Woburne, Bucks, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 May, 1667, aged 16, B.A. 4 March, 1670-1, fellow, M.A. 1673, B.D. (by decree) 17 Nov., 1684, then chaplain to James, lord Chandos, ambassador at Constantinople. See Ath. ii. 393.

Carew, Matthew, s. John, of Harberton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 18; B.A. 1671, rector of Haccombe, Devon, 1672, and of Bickleih 1678-84. See also Edward 1683, and Thomas 1685. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Parks, John, s. John, of Worcester (city), pleb. p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1667, aged 18; B.A. 1671, as Parkes (brother of Thomas 1670); one of these names rector of Peopleton, co. Worcester, 1667-72. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Zouch, Humphrey, s. John, of London, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1667, aged 17; B.A. from Magdalen Coll. 1670; M.A. from Hart Hall 1673; rector of All Hallows, Lombard Street, 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morris, John, s. Rich., of Llangedwyn, co. Denbigh, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 March, 1667, aged 20; B.A. 1670, M.A. 1673 (as Maurice), perhaps rector of Llan-Eigan, co. Carnarvon, 1670. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jeffrys, Benjamin, s. William, of Home Castle, co. Worcester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1667, aged 18; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1677. See Henry 1655 & Francis 1605. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Whitefoot, Paul, s. Tho., of Worcester (city), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 Feb., 1667-8, aged 17, B.A. 1671; rector of Spetchley 1677, and of Croome d'Abitot, (both) co. Worcester, 1684. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bowen, Thomas, s. Tho., of Berriw par., co. Montgomery, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1667, aged 15; B.A. 1671, M.A. 1674, incorp. at Cambridge 1680. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Robinson, i. 262.

White, Francis, s. Samson, of Oxford, equitis. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 Dec., 1667, aged 15, B.A. 1671, M.A. 1674, B.D. 1684; his father mayor of Oxford and knighted 25 April, 1661; brother of Gilbert 1668.
Herbert, Benjamin, s. William, of Hanley, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 17; B.A. 1671; rector of Suckley, co. Worcester, 1676. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Sloper, Walter, s. Walter, of London, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 15, B.A. 1671, M.A. 1674; rector of West Deane, Wilts, 1682, father of the next. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Adams, William, s. William, of Totnes, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 17; B.A. 1671, vicar of Yealmpton, Devon, 1681. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Brough, Edmund s. (William), dean of Gloucester. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 May, 1667, aged 18; a student of Middle Temple 1671. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Wood, Thomas, s. Rich., of Collington, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1667, aged 19; brother of Richard 1665. See John 1708.
Clarke, John, s. James, of Tiverton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 18; B.A. 1671, rector of Dolton, Devon, 1680.
Stanby, William, s. William, of Badgworth, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 May, 1667, aged 16, B.A. 1671, as Stansby.
Hatton, William s. William, of Tewkesbury, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 March, 1667-8, aged 14; B.A. 1671.
Collins, Samuel, s. John, of Kingstone, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 19; B.A. 1671.
Colwell, Andrew, s. Robert, of Totnes, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 March, 1667, aged 16; B.A. 1670.
Weyman, Richard, s. Giles, of Standish, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 Nov., 1667, aged 18.
Luscombe, Richard, s. John, of Stokenham, Devon, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1667-8, aged 18.

White, John, s. Rich., of Worting, Hants, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 24 April, 1668, aged 15, B.A. 1 Feb., 1671-2, M.A. 1674; rector of Deane 1676-1713, Ash 1686-1713, and of Nateley Scures, (all) Hants, 1697-1718; father of Richard 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Stephens, Francis (Stevenes), s. Fr., of Rodborne Cheyney, Wilts, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 18, B.A. 1672 (as Stephens); rector of Stratfield Turgis, Hants, 1671. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morse, Abraham, s. Abr., of Newent, co. Glouc., p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 April, 1668, aged 17; B.A. 1 Feb., 1671-2, rector of Huntley, co. Gloucester, 1688; father of Jackman 1709. See Index Eccl.
Wilson, Edward, s. Rob., of Merton, Surrey, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 24 April, 1668, aged 15; student of Lincoln's Inn 1673; brother of Robert same date. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Toldervey, Thomas, s. Christopher, of Oxford (city), pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 17, B.A. 1672, admon. at Oxford 5 April, 1673.
Powell, John, s. Rees, of Llanvair Waterdine, co. Montgomery, pauperis. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1668-9, aged 20; B.A. 1672.
Wilson, Robert, s. Rob., of Merton, Surrey, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 24 April, 1668, aged 17; brother of Edward same date.
Savage, Henry, s. Henry, S.T.D., and master of Balliol. Balliol Coll., matric. entry 9 Jan., 1668-9, aged 13; B.A. 1676.
Warters, William, s. G. (? Gul.), of Buckingham (town), minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1668, aged 19.
Pearkes, Edward, s. Edw., of Aston, Salop, pauperis. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1668-9, aged 18.
Downes, Thomas, s. Tho., of Longdon, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 June, 1668, aged 20.
Fletcher, John, s. John, of Oxford city, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1668, aged 16.

Humphreys, Evan, s. "Hum. Davis", of Llanvihangel, co. Monmouth, pp. Balliol Coll. matric. 27 May, 1669, aged 18; B.A. 1 March, 1672-3; incorporated at Cambridge, 1681, M.A. from St. John's Coll. 1681, re-incorporated at Oxford, 12 July, 1681, vicar of Llanyblodwell, Salop, 1674, and rector of Llanymynech, Salop, 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Norwood, Thomas, s. Franc., of Leckhampton, co, Gloucester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1669-70, aged 16; B.A. 1673, M.A. 1676, rector of Brattleby, and of Fillingham 1688, both co. Lincoln, rector of Leckhampton, co. Gloucester, 1707, until his death 15 Aug., 1734. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morse, Edward, s. William, of Llanwarne, co. Hereford, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 March, 1669-70, aged 16; B.A. 1673, M.A. 1676, vicar of Llandinabo, co. Hereford, 1675, and rector of Llanwarne 1676; father of Timothy 1704. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Reynalds, Valentine, s. John, of Garthmel, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. entry 27 May, 1669, aged 13, B.A. 1 March, 1672-3; M.A. from New Inn Hall 1678, as Reynolds, rector of Llangower, co. Merioneth, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jackson, William, s. William, of Northleach, co. Gloucester, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 15; B.A. 1673, fellow, M.A. 20 March, 1677-8; admon. at Oxford Nov., 1681; brother of Christopher 1678, and of John 1675.
Cornes, Richard, s. John, of Sheldorne, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 April, 1669, aged 19; one of these names rector of Broome, co. Stafford, 1707. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Norwood, William, s. Francis, of Leckhampton, co. Gloucester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 25 March, 1669, aged 16; B.A. 1672, student of Inner Temple 1675. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Tayler, John, s. George, of Coreley, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 March, 1669-70, aged 17, B.A. 1673; rector of Hope Baggot, Salop, 1680. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Greaves, Richard, s. Sam., of Sifton, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1669-70, aged 16; B.A. 1673, M.A. 1676, B.D. 1684; perhaps brother of Thomas 1680.
Green, William, s. R., of Offington, Berks, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 16; B.A. 1673, M.A. 1676. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Jones, Edward, s. "Joh. Edwards", of Mowddy, co. Merioneth, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1669-70, aged 21.
Andrewes, Thomas, s. Anth., of Harsfield, co. Gloucester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 May, 1669, aged 17.
Lowe, Charles, s. Tho., of Bormill, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1669, aged 18; B.A. 1672.
Wynne, Richard, s. Rich., of Llangedwin, co. Denbigh, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 July, 1669, aged 20.
Masters, John, s. Herb., of Burghill, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1669, aged 16.
Colsary, John, s. John, of Pidmister, Somerset, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 July, 1669, aged 17.
Lyde, Nicholas, s. Nic., of Lovington, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 April, 1669, aged 17.
Prichard, John, s. Rich., of Cherbury, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 27 May, 1669, aged 17.

Pinhorne, John, s. William, of Southampton (town), pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1670, aged 16; B.A. 1674, M.A. 1677, vicar of Eling, Hants, 1690, and prebendal rector of Leckford, Hants, 1703. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Parks, Thomas, s. John, of Worcester (city), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1670, aged 17; B.A. 1674 as Parkes, vicar of Upton Snodsbury, co. Worcester, 1675; brother of John 1667. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Parris, Lewes, s. Lewis, of Milverton, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1670, aged 16; B.A. from New Inn Hall 1674, M.A. 1677, vicar of North Curry, Somerset, 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Webbe, Ambrose, s. Edw., of Kingsclere, Hants, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1670, aged 16, B.A. 20 Jan., 1673-4, M.A. 1677; vicar of Kingscleere 1682. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Rosse, Thomas, s. T., of Dilwinge, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 June, 1670, aged 18, B.A. 1674, vicar of Hope-under-Dinmore, co. Hereford; father of the next-named.
Owen, John, s. "Ow. Roberts," of Llangristilis, co. Anglesey, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1670, aged 18, B.A. 1674.
Edgcomb, John, s. William, of "Hanly East," co. Worcester, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 July, 1670, aged 17; B.A. 1674.
Evans, Lewis, s. Rowl., of Carno, co. Montgomery, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 July, 1670, aged 17; B.A. 1674.
Jones, David, s. "Joh. David", of Bettws, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 April, 1670, aged 20.
Archer, Richard, s. John, of Islington, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1670, aged 19; B.A. 1674.
Eastwood, Thomas, s. Thomas, of Newent, co. Gloucester, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1670, aged 15.
Roderick, Robert, s. William, of Carnarvon (town), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1670, aged 17.
Price, Richard, s. R., of Shrewsbury, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 April, 1670, aged 17.

D'Avenant, Charles, 1s. William, of London, eq. aur. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 July, 1671, aged 15; LL.D. Cambridge or Dublin about 1700 ('by favour and money'), political economist, practiced in Doctor's Commons, M.P. St. Ives 1685-7, Great Bedwin 1698-1701, 'joint inspector of plays,' inspector-general of the exports and imports of the customs, died 6 Nov., 1714, father of Henry M. and brother of William 1673. See Ath., i. cxviii., iv. 476; Rawlinson, i. 185; & D.N.B.

Price, Thomas (Pryce), s. Arth., of Berriew, co. Montgomery, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 July, 1671, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 1675 (as Price); possibly bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1683 (as of Lanvillin, co. Montgomery, gen.); licenced 8 June, 1688, to marry Mary Guillim, of St. Dunstan-in-the West, London, spinster. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Prowse, George (Prouse), s. Charles, of Old Cleeve, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 June, 1671, aged 17; B.A. 6 Feb., 1674-5, M.A. 1677; perhaps chaplain to All Souls' Coll., see Ath. i. p. cxviii.
France, Frederick, s. Tho., of Shelsley, co. Worcester, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 18; B.A. 1674, rector of Edwin Ralph, co. Hereford, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tasker, John, of Rowton, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1671-2, aged 19, B.A. 1675, M.A. 1678; vicar of Winterbourne St. Martin, Dorset, 1680. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Harrison, George, s. Al., of West Quantoxhead, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 March, 1671-2, aged 17, B.A. 1675, vicar of Kilton, Somerset, 1683. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Falvey, William, s. Luc., of Exeter, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 18; died, a batler of St. Alban Hall, 10 May, 1674. See Gutch, i. app. 211.
Browne, John, s. R. of Worcester (city), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 19; perhaps B.A. from New Inn Hall 17 March, 1678-9.
Jones, Robert, s. Edw., of Llanwylling, co. Montgom., pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1671-2, aged 18; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 1675.
Poore, Abraham, s. Ab., of Cullington, Wilts, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 19; B.A. from Hart Hall 1674.
Stoodleigh, Thomas, s. Elnath, of "Newton-Abnor" (Newton Abbot), Devon, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 16.
Jones, John, s. John, of Shrewsbury, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 17; B.A. 1674, M.A. 1682.
Taylor, Michael, s. Mich., of Grantham (? co. Lincoln), pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 July, 1671, aged 17.
Davies, Cadwalader, s. Arth., of Berry, co. Montgomery, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 July, 1671, aged 19.
Thomas, John, s. Hug., of Kyre-wyard, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 17.
Cressett, Robert, s. R., of Upton Cressett, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 17.
Penrhy, Evan, s. James, of Newtown, co. Montgomery, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1671, aged 19.
Ellis, Charles (Ellys), s. Hugh, of Oxford city, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 Nov. 1671, aged 16.
Hunt, Thomas, s. Th., of Blackawton, Devon, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 19.
Broughton, John, s. Edw., of London, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1671, aged 14.

Hayley, William, s. William, of Cleobury Mortimer, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 15; chorister, clerk, and fellow of All Souls' Coll., B.A. 1676, M.A. 1680, B. and D.D. 1695, chaplain to Sir William Trumbull, ambassador at Constantinople, and at Paris, rector of St. Giles-in-the-Fields 1695, dean of Chichester 1699, until his death 30 Oct., 1715. See Lansdowne MS. 987, f. 374; Fasti, ii. 372; Rawl. iii. 183; Hearne, i. 218, 322; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Griffiths, Jerome, s. Peter, of Disserth, co. Radnor, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 21; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679, licenced (v.g.) 5 May, 1680, to marry Ann, daughter of John Phillips, rector of Disserth, co. Radnor (1660-80), rector of Disserth 1680, prebendary of St. Davids 1680, vicar and prebendary of Llansantffraid, co. Radnor, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Downes, Theophilus, s. John, of Purslow, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 15; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679, fellow, but ejected for declining to take the oath of allegiance to William III., and died in 1726; one of these names vicar of Minehead, Somerset, 1686-7. See Ath., iv. 476; Rawlinson, ii. 193; Weaver, 401; & D.N.B.

Rogers, John, s. Th., of Wentnor, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 Feb., 1672-3, aged 17; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679, vicar of Staunton Longa, Salop, 1686-1717; memo. one of these names vicar of Weedon Bec, Northants, 1689-1734, buried there 7 May, 1736. See Baker's Northants, i. 454; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Nation, John, s. Fr., of Parkham, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 May, 1672, aged 16; B.A. 29 Jan., 1675-6, M.A. 1678, vicar of Halse, Somerset, 1679, and Llandow, als. St. Kew, Cornwall, 1694; brother of Francis same date, and father of Francis last-named. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Linacre, George, s. Geo., of Castle Froome, co. Hereford, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 19, B.A. 1676; perhaps rector of Bampton Brian, co. Hereford, 1681, his father rector of Castle Froome 1668. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Durman, William, s. G. (? 'Gul.'), of Elmston, Hardwyke, co. Gloucester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 May, 1672, aged 17; B.A. 1677, rector of Holcombe, Somerset, 1678, and of Stratton-on-theFosse 1685. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Beach, William, s. William, of Fittleton, Wilts, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 March, 1672-3, aged 17; of Fittleton and Keevil, Wilts, baptized at Brixton Deverell, 4 Jan., 1655, buried at Keevil 24 Aug., 1741, father of Thomas 1707.

Bagley, John, s. William, of Walford, co. Hereford, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 18; B.A. 29 Jan., 1675-6, M.A. 1678, 'afterwards took the D. Med. degree at Utrecht and published his theses.' See Fasti, ii. 366.

Pember, Thomas, of Newport, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 16; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 1676, M.A. 1680, student of Inner Temple 1674; brother of Francis, same date. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Mytton, Henry (Mitton), s. H(enry), of Shipton, Salop, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 14; of Shipton, bar.-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1680; died in May, 1688; brother of Thomas 1685. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Powell, Edward, s. E., of Shadwell, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 17; fellow Jesus Coll., B.A. 18 Jan., 1675-6, M.A. 1678; died 6 Feb., 1685-6; will at Oxford proved 12 Feb., 1686. See Gutch, i. 590.
Mathewes, Robert, s. William, of Stretton, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 March, 1672-3, aged 18; possibly student of Gray's Inn 1680, as of Blodwell, Salop, esq. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Bedford, James, s. 'G.,' of Stretford, co. Hereford, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 18; one of these names vicar of Monkland, co. Hereford, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Bytheway, Richard, s. R(ichard), of Leintwardine, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 15; a student of the Middle Temple 1678. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lloyd, Pierce, s. Tho., of Kitsfield, co. Montgomery, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 June, 1672, aged 15; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1682. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Phillips, John, s. Ph., of Heyop, co. Radnor, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1672-3, aged 19; one of these names vicar of Llansantffraid 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wintour, William, s. William, of Dymock, co. Gloucester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 June, 1672, aged 17; a student of Middle Temple 1676, See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Nation, Francis, s. Fr., of Parkham, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 May, 1672, aged 17; B.A. 29 Jan., 1675-6, M.A. 1678; brother of John same date.
Ingram, Edward, s. E., of Martley, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 Nov., 1672, aged 18, B.A. 1678; M.A. from Oriel Coll. 1680.
Abrahall, John, s. George, of Foye, co. Hereford, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 March, 1672-3, aged 16; brother of George 1677.
Gwilt, Richard, s. William, of Diddleberry, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1672, aged 18; called " Guilt" in Mat. Reg.
Webb, James, s. Tho., of Hannington, Hants, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 Nov., 1672, aged 15, B.A. 1676 as Webbe.
Moore, John, s. John, of Leigh, co. Worcester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 June, 1672, aged 17; B.A. 1676, as More.
Farmer, John, s. Geo., of Churchstock, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 July, 1672, aged 19; B.A. 1676.
Pember, Francis, of Newport, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 18; brother of Thomas.
Preston, Henry, s. Walter, of Ipplepen, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 March, 1672-3, aged 17, B.A. 1676.
Bayliffe, William, s. G. (? 'Gul'), of Mouncton, Wilts, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 June, 1672, aged 16.
Browne, Benjamin, s. John, of Shobdon, co. Hereford, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1672, aged 19.
Ansell, Nicholas, s. Ric., of Graveneys, Beds, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 17.
Sweeting, John, s. J., of Picknaller, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 18.
Smith, Thomas, s. Th., of Chesterton, Oxon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 Feb., 1672-3, aged 18.
Swift, John, s. William, of Worcester (city), gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 June, 1672, aged 16.
Tayler, Nicholas, s. N., of Heath, co. Radnor, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 July, 1672, aged 17.
Shorter, Nicholas, s. Geo., of Witney, Oxon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 Dec., 1672, aged 16.
Piper, Thomas, s. Th., of Onybury, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 March, 1672-3, aged 20.

Lee, Henry, s. John, of Southfleet, Kent, "Doct." Balliol Coll., matric. 4 July, 1673, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1676, licenced (V.G.) 13 Oct., 1679, to marry Dorothy How, of St. Dunstan'sin-the-West, spinster; perhaps M.P. Hindon (Dec.), 1697-8, and for Canterbury in 10 parliaments 1685-7, 1689-95, and 1698-1715, commissioner of the victualling office 1711; died 6 Sept., 1734; father of Warner 1698, and of Henry Lee Warner 1705. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Rusbatch, John, s. J., of Corely, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1673-4, aged 17, B.A. 1678; rector of Somerset St. Mary, and St. Mary Mounthaw, London, 1684; licenced (V.G.) 22 Sept., 1687, to marry Sarah Kirkham, of St. Leonard, Foster Lane, London. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Watkin, William, s. Th., of Glascomb, co. Radnor, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 June, 1673, aged 23; perhaps rector of Aston, co. Hereford, 1677, and vicar of Long Staunton, Salop, 1680, and rector of Vaynor, co. Brecon, 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Newton, Jonathan, s. Matth., of Calcott, Northumberland, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 Nov., 1673, aged 18; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1688. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Evett, John, s. Henry, of Hallow, co. Worcester, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 Nov., 1673, aged 17; died 13 May, 1675, aged 21, buried in college chapel. See Gutch, i. 102.
Haywood, Thomas, s. Arth., of Wettleton, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1673-4, aged 19; B.A. 1677, rector of Silvington, Salop, 1683. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Haycroft, John, s. Rob., of Tiverton, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 Nov., 1673, aged 17; B.A. 1677, M.A. 20 Jan., 1680-1, fellow; admon. at Oxford 24 Oct., 1685.
Roe, Bold, s. Th., of Pontesbury, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 March, 1673-4, aged 18; rector of Great Carlton, co. Lincoln, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Sartain, Thomas, s. Th., of Corsham, Wilts, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 May, 1673, aged 18; rector of Monkton Farleigh, Wilts, 1696. See Foster's Index Eccl.
William(s), Abraham, s. A., of Doddington, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 Nov., 1673, aged 15; scholar Wadham Coll. 1676, B.A. 1677, as Williams.
Ley, Isaac, s. William, of Woodburne, Bucks, minister, Balliol Coll., matric. 12 June, 1673, aged 16; B.A. 1678.
Bowles, Richard, s. R., of Great Marlow, Bucks, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 June, 1673, aged 16.
Barnett, John, s. Jos., of Ironbridge, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 April, 1673, aged 20.

Dunbar, William, s. Alexander, of Whittington, co. Gloucester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 June, 1674, aged 16; one of these names (as M.A.) rector of Little Burstead 1682, and of Ramsden Crays, Essex, 1684-1723, Alexander Dunbar instituted rector of Whittington 14 Nov., 1670. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Davies, Herbert, s. Rob., of Wigmore, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 16; B.A. 1677, M.A. 10 March, 1680-1, rector of Weybridge, Surrey, 1690, of Harleston, Suffolk, 1708, and of Barnham Broom, Norfolk, 1708. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Stayner, Richard, s. R(ichard), of London, equitis. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 June, 1674, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1676; his father rearadmiral, knighted 11 Jan., 1657, by Cromwell; buried in Greenwich church 28 Nov., 1662. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Berrowe, Thomas, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 July, 1674; B.A. from Hart Hall 1678; incorp. at Cambridge 1690, M.A. from Queen's Coll. 1690, rector of Corringham, Essex, 1687, and of St. Martin's Outwich, London, 1691. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Betham, Edward, s. E(dward), of Whitchurch, co. Hereford, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 July, 1674, aged 18; B.A. 1678, M.A. 20 Jan., 1680-1, rector of Sollers Hope, co. Hereford, 1682, and vicar of How Caple 1697. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Tayler, Shadrach, s. Sh., of Bell-Broughton, co. Worcester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 15, B.A. 1677; M.A. from Peter House, Cambridge, 1683; rector of Eastergate 1682, and vicar of Felpham, Sussex, 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Isaac, s. Rees, of Builth, co. Brecon, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1674-5, aged 22; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1681, rector of Winchester St. Maurice, and St. Mary Calendar 1682, and of Hartley Wespall 1700. See Foster's Index Eccl.

King, Richard, s. William, of Birmingham, co. Warwick, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 16, B.A. 1678; M.A. from Christ Church 1681, rector of Marston Bigott, Somerset, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Good, Thomas, s. Rich., of "Salvage Med," Salop, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 May, 1674, aged 17; B.A. 1678, M.A. 3 March, 1680-1, rector of Astley, co. Worcester, 1696. See Rawl. v. 447; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Levett, John, s. Nic., of Eastbourne, Sussex, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1674, aged 16; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1681; rector of Overton, Hants, 1699-1712, and of Hethe, Oxon, 1699-1712. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Newman, Robert, of Beminister, Dorset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 July, 1674, aged 25; perhaps B.A. from Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge, 1680, and rector of Bettiscombe, Dorset, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Cother, John, s. Rich., of Ripple, co. Worcester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 19; B.A. from Hart Hall 1677, rector of Severn Stoke, co. Worcester, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Eastway, Richard, s. El., of Bradworthy, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1674-5, aged 18; B.A. 1678; M.A. from St. Mary Hall 1681, rector of Sutcombe, Devon, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgan, Richard, s. R., of Llandyssil, co. Montgomery, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 May, 1674, aged 18; B.A. 14 March, 1677-8, vicar of Llanllwchaiarn, co. Montgomery, 1688. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lux, William, s. William, of Ipplepen, Devon, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1674-5, aged 18; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1682; vicar of Kenton, Devon, 1689, until his death in 1715; father of the next.
Day, John, s. J., of Oxford (city), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 April, 1674, aged 15; B.A. 1677, M.A. 28 Feb., 1684-5, vicar of Aston Rowant, Oxon, 1702-23. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Turner, Richard, s. Geo., of Jacobstow, Devon, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 16, B.A. 1679; rector of Jacobstowe 1694, and of Tetcott, Devon, 1697. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Risdon, William, s. John, of Bishops Teignton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 17, B.A. 1677, M.A. 1680; vicar of Bishops Teignton 1684; died the next year.
Baber, Francis, s. John, of Covent Garden, Middlesex, 'equitis.' Balliol Coll., matric. 26 June, 1674, aged 16, a student of Lincoln's Inn 1678. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Bent, John, s. George, of Jacobstow, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 19; B.A. 1677, M.A. 1680, admon. granted at Oxford 25 June, 1686.
Cleland, Benjamin, s. Th., of Ashbrenton, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 June, 1674, aged 16; B.A. 1678 (called Clevland in Mat. Reg.).
Aller, Nathaniel (or Nathan Alder), s. John, of Sampford Courtenay, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 18; B.A. 1677.
Llangford, Edward, s. E. of Bitterley, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 April, 1674, aged 20; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 1679, M.A. 1684.
Dennaford, John, s. William, of Exborne, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 16; (called Doniford in Mat. Reg.).
Hole, John, s. John, of Zeal Monachorum, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 20; called "Hall" in Mat. Reg.
Hopkins, William, s. John, of Martin, co. Worcester, pleb. (subs. "paup.") Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 16.
Dolby, Thomas, s. Geo., of Oxford (city), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 14; B.A. 1677, M.A. 1681.
Boteler, Philip, s. John, of Parkham, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1674-5, aged 16; B.A. 1678.
Parker, Theodore, s. Edm., of Plimpton St. Mary, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 17.
Dixon, Robert, s. Percival, of Fenwyke, Northumberland, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 June, 1674, aged 20.
Gower, Thomas, s. J., of Droitwich, co. Worcester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 16.
Crosse, Andrew, s. A., of Bromfield, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 17.
Jones, Morgan, s. Th., of Llanveglan, co. Brecon, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 Nov., 1674, aged 20.
Ludlow, Adam, s. Geo., of Morehouse, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 June, 1674, aged 16.
Throckmorton, Francis, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 July, 1674.

Humphreys, Richard (Humfreys), s. Geo., of Caveham (?), Wilts, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 15; B.A. from St. Edmund Hall 1678, rector of Calloes or Kelwayes 1681, and of Draycott Cerne 1687, vicar of Kington St. Michael, all Wilts, 1688; father of Richard 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Watts, John, s. William, of Much-Marcle, co. Hereford, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 Feb., 1675-6, aged 18; B.A. from Brasenose Coll. 1679; baptised at Much-Marcle 3 Feb., 1656-7; vicar of Much-Marcle 1682, until his death; buried there 10 June, 1700; brother of Joseph 1678, and of William 1663.

Vaughan, Silvanus, s. John, of Hargest, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 March, 1675-6, aged 17, B.A. 1679; M.A. from Hart Hall 1682; rector of Tilston, Cheshire, 1685; buried at Kington 9 July, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bulkley, Richard, s. Benj., of Clayfelton, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 17; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1681, B. & D.D. 1691, canon of Hereford 1684, rector of Ludlow 1685, died in 1702. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

May, Christopher, s. Christopher, of Basing, Hants, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 Nov., 1675, aged 15; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682, rector of Slindon 1683, vicar of Madehurst, Sussex, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Smith, Richard, s. Edw., of Thame, Oxon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 16; B.A. from Hart Hall 1679, M.A. 1682; perhaps rector of Remenham, Berks, 1684. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Potter, John, s. Rich., of Kidderminster, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 May, 1675, aged 19; one of these names rector of Feckenham, co. Worcester, 1698-1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Edwards, Jonathan, s. Tho., of Salop town (U.), gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 17; B.A. from Hart Hall 1678, vicar of Brace Meole, Salop, 1680, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gwillym, James, s. William, of "Langston," co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll. matric. 26 Feb., 1675-6, aged 15; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682, proctor 1691; brother of Thomas and Wm. 1667.
Bowens, Edward, s. William, of Llanywerne, co. Brecon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 March, 1675-6, aged 17; B.A. 1679, vicar of Christ Church, Hants, 1689, as Bowen.
Brewer, Thomas, s. William, of Trowbridge, Wilts, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 March, 1675-6, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1678. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Powell, Thomas, s. Rob., of Gyngrog (Llangynog), co. Montgomery, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 1 Nov., 1675, aged 17; rector of Llangynog 1684. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tooker, John, s. J., of Bradford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 Feb., 1675-6, aged 17, B.A. 1679; M.A. from St. Mary Hall 1682; perhaps father of William 1696.
Marsh, Philip, s. Th., of West Quantoxhead, Somerset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 27 March, 1675, aged 15; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 1678.
Smith, John, s. J., of Bovey-Tracey, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 Feb., 1675-6, aged 17; B.A. from Hart Hall 1679, M.A. 1682.
Hurdman, George, s. William, of Turley, co. Gloucester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 March, 1675-6, aged 16; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682.
Cox, John, s. J., of Clent, co. Stafford, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 April, 1675, aged 17; B.A. 17 March, 1678-9.
Thomas, James, s. Joh., of London, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 July, 1675, aged 17, B.A. from Merton Coll. 1682.
Vaughan, Griffith, s. Dav., of Llanvechan, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 March, 1675-6, aged 19.
Richards, Thomas, s. Th., of Harberton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 Feb., 1675-6, aged 18; B.A. 1679.
Tringham, Thomas, s. Th., of Hereford, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 July, 1675, aged 21; father of the next.
Maynard, William, s. J., of Bradford, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 19; B.A. 1678.
Davies, Edward, s. Rob., of Maisemore, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 16.
Barker, John, s. Geo., of Drayton, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 July, 1675, aged 15; B.A. 1679.
Holland, John, s. J., of Brimfield, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 Nov., 1675, aged 15.
Hawkins, John s. William, of Stowgumber, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 May, 1675, aged 19.
Cleland, Thomas, s. Th., of Ashbrenton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 Feb., 1675-6, aged 17.
Upton, Roger, s. Geo., of Fitzhead, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 May, 1675, aged 18.

Cross, Robert, s. Andrew, of Bromfield, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1676, aged 16; B.A. 1680, fellow, M.A. 1683, died in college 3 Feb., 1684-5, buried in the college chapel on the 6th, his will proved at Oxford same day. See Gutch, i. 103.

Delacourt, Anthony, s. A(nthony), of Tilshead, Wilts, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 March, 1676-7, aged 20; vicar of Chitterne All Saints, Wilts, 1676, his father instituted vicar of Tilshead, Wilts, 1663. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Abell, William, s. William, of Tiverton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 Nov., 1676, aged 17 (called Abes in Mat. Reg.); B.A. 1680, M.A. 1683, one of these names rector of Studland, Dorset, in 1691. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Price, Ralph, s. Barth., of Farnbrough, Berks, minister. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 May, 1676, aged 16; B.A. 22 Jan., 1679-80, M.A. 1682, rector of Rotherfield Grays, Oxon, 1687; brother of Bartholomew 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jordan, Nathaniel, s. Edw., of Sibdon, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 March, 1676-7, aged 18; B.A. from Hart Hall 1680, M.A. 1683, rector of Shelve, Salop, 1687, and of Tarrant Rushton, Dorset, 1697. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Greenway, Richard (Greeneway), s. Griffith, of Hereford city, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 April, 1676, aged 17; B.A. 18 March, 1679-80, M.A. 1683, vicar of Walford, co. Hereford, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Pym, John, s. Hugh, of Clayhanger, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 1 June, 1676, aged 18; B.A. 1680, rector of Clayhanger 1688-95, and of Lifton Cheney, Somerset, 1695. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Marston, Thomas, s. Je. (or Jo.?), of Ascott, Salop. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 July, 1676, aged 17; B.A. 1680, M.A. 1683, rector of Cainham, Salop, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Pulley, George, s. Edw., of Petton, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 June, 1676, aged 15; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1685. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Hill, Andrew, s. A(ndrew), of Burford, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 Oct., 1676, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1676. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Oliver, Thomas, s. "Oliver Thomas," of Berriew, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 June, 1676, aged 20.
Blake, William, s. Nic., of Dunster, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 1 June, 1676, aged 17; B.A. 1680.

Vernon, Edward, s. Geo., of Stoke Milborough, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 May, 1677, aged 17; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 22 Feb., 1680-1; M.A. Lambeth 16 May, 1698; rector of Merrow, Surrey, 1684; licenced 30 March, 1687, to marry Mary Butler, of St. Margaret Lothbury; rector of Guildford St. Mary 1691, of Edlaston, co. Derby, 1692, vicar of Wolstanton, co. Stafford, 1696, and rector of Redmill, co. Leicester, 1698, until his death 23 Dec., 1742. See London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster.

Morse, Robert, s. R., of Coln St. Denis, co. Gloucester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 May, 1677, aged 16; B.A. from Merton Coll. 17 Feb., 1680-1, M.A. 1683, rector of Little Wormington 1690, and of Willersey, co. Gloucester, 1691, and of Tredington, co. Worcester, 1701, where he died 8 July, 1703. See Rawl. ii. 68, xvii. 259b; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Kebby, Benjamin, s. Giles, of Broomefield, Somerset, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 May, 1677, aged 20; B.A. 1680; perhaps curate of Cannington; rector of Staplegrove, Somerset, 1691-1747; father of Michael, and William, and perhaps of the next-named. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Brydges, Francis, s. Marshall, of Tiberton, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 July, 1677, aged 15; of Tiberton, a student of the Middle Temple in 1677, died 16 Oct., 1727, brother of Marshall and William 1681. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Mander, Richard, s. William, of Morchard-Crwys, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 1 March, 1677-8, aged 17; B.A. 1681, M.A. 1684; rector of Wemworthy 1707, vicar of Cadbury 1709, and rector of Broad Nymett (all Devon), 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Prince, Philip (Prynce), s. Wriothesley, of Abcott, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 Dec., 1677, aged 17; vicar of Buckerell, 1704-11, and rector of Musbury, Devon, 1711-13. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gore, Joseph, s. Jos., of Sandford Brett, Somerset, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1677-8, aged 15; B.A. 9 March, 1681-2, rector of West Quantoxhead, Somerset, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Hopkins, Richard, s. Th., of Pencoyd, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1677-8, aged 19, B.A. 1681; perhaps vicar of Whitkirk, Yorks, 1689. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Booth, William, s. William, of Witton, co. Warwick, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 May, 1677, aged 17; a student of Middle Temple 1674. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Downer, Haward, s. Edw., of Southampton, Hants, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 March, 1677-8, aged 15; scholar of Wadham Coll. 1681, B.A. 23 Feb., 1681-2, M.A. 1684.
Hancox, Samuel, s. Th., of Swanbourne, Bucks, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1677-8, aged 18; his father vicar of Swanbourne 1660. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Symonds, Robert, s. Rob., of Hereford (city), gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 March, 1677-8, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1679. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
James, Richard, s. R., of Llanigan, co. Brecon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 18; rector of Cathedine, Brecon, 1684. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Moore, Charles, s. George, of Gloucester (city), pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1677-8, aged 18; B.A. from Gloucester Hall 1681.
Jackman, Richard, s. R., of Milton Abbas, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 July, 1677, aged 20; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 1682.
Dickenson, Francis, s. John, of Sherborn St. John's, Hants, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 March, 1677-8, aged 15; B.A. 1681.
Cocks, Thomas, s. Charles, of Woodmancote, co. Gloucester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 17; B.A. 1680.
Gardiner, John, s. Rich., of Northleach, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Feb., 1677-8, aged 16; B.A. 1681.
Snow, William, s. William, of South Stoke, Oxon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 July, 1677, aged 23, B.A. 1681.
Phillipps, Samuel, s. William, of Michaelchurch, co. Radnor, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 July, 1677, aged 20.
Kidley, Daniel (Kydley), s. I., of Fownhope, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 May, 1677, aged 18.
Gardner, John, s. Greg., of Brompton Regis, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 19.
Feckenham, Thomas, s. John, of Ross, co. Hereford, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 Nov., 1677, aged 17.
Badham, James, s. Jo., of Felton, co. Hereford, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 July, 1677, aged 17.
Parker, Edward, s. Rob., of Wishford, Wilts, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 March, 1677-8, aged 18.
Meyricke, John, s. J., of "Clunton," Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 March, 1677-8, aged 16.
Prust, Joseph, s. Jos., of Monkleigh, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 18.
Stedman, Edward, s. Sam., of Easthope, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 May, 1677, aged 17.
Jordan, Job, s. Th., of Ludlow, Salop, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1677, aged 19.
Farmer, John, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 May, 1677.

Hughes, William, s. Tho., of Hampnett, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 Nov., 1678, aged 16; B.A. from Magdalen Hall 1682, vicar of Windrush, co. Gloucester, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jackson, Christopher, (born at Bampton, Oxon), s. William, of Northleach, co. Gloucester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 July, 1678, aged 16; brother of John 1675, and William 1670.
Whitehall, John, s. Rob., of Whitchurch, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Nov., 1678, aged 18; student of Gray's Inn 1681 (his father Rowland). See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Mogridge, John, s. Joh., of Holcombe, Devon, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1678, aged 15; B.A. 1682, vicar of Burlescombe, Devon, 1689. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Leek, Herbert, s. William, of Osberton, Notts, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 June, 1678, aged 17; student of Inner Temple 1679. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Stephens, Thomas, s. Tho., of Whittington, co. Gloucester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 March, 1678-9, aged 19, B.A. 1682.
Derby, George (Darby), s. Joh., of Coln-Rogers, co. Gloucester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 Dec., 1678, aged 19.
Thomas, William, s. "Tho. Evans," of Isle of Anglesey, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 May, 1678, aged 18.
Blinman, John, s. Rog., of Sandford Brett, Somerset. pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 July, 1678, aged 18.

Russell, John, s. John, of Calne, Wilts, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 May, 1679, aged 18; minister of Poole, Dorset, 1684; chaplain of St. John's, Wapping, 1689, rector 1694, vicar of Little Bedwin, Wilts, 1693-1723; died at St. Mary Cray, Kent, 27 Sept., 1723, buried in St. John's, Wapping; father of John next-named. See Rawl. xviii. 333; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Skinner, Thomas, s. William, of Ledbury, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. entry 12 April, 1679, aged 14, B.A. 1682, M.A. 1685 (as Skynner); lieutenant of a company of scholars 1685, during the Duke of Monmouth's rebellion; perhaps rector of Enmore 1689-1729, and vicar of Wellington, Somerset, 1694-1720. See Ath. i. p. civ; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Palmer, Matth, s. Tho., of Newcastle-upon-Tyne, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 July, 1679, aged 17; B.A. from Corpus Christi Coll. 1683, M.A. 28 Feb., 1686-7, vicar of Harringworth, Northants, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Weekes, Thomas, s. William, of Calne, Wilts, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 March, 1679, aged 18, B.A. 22 Feb., 1682-3; rector of Rode, Somerset (M.A.), 1690, and of Great Chalfield, Wilts, 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Head, Henry, s. Edw., of Chilton, Berks, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1679, aged 15; B.A. 1682, M.A. 1685, vicar of Berkeley, co. Gloucester, 1691-1728, canon of Bristol 1722-39, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Martin, Leicester, s. Rob., of Leigh, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1679, aged 17; M.P. Suffolk (Dec.), 1707-8; died 11 Oct., 1732. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.
Stratford, John, s. Rob., of Walford, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 July, 1679, aged 15; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1687, and bencher 1712. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Jones, Edward, s. E., of Hereford city, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 April, 1679, aged 17; rector of Moccas, and vicar of Vowchurch, co. Hereford, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Dyke, William, s. J(ohn), of Dulverton, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1679, aged 17; of the Middle Temple 1683. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Harman, Philip, s. John, of Calne, Wilts, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 May, 1679, aged 15, and also St. Edmund Hall 30 April, 1685, aged 15.
Price, Hugo, s. Price Griffin, of Llandownar, co. Anglesey, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 June, 1679, aged 18; B.A. 17 Feb., 1682-3.
Dibble, Edward, s. E., of Goathurst, Somerset, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 May, 1679, aged 17; B.A. 17 Feb., 1682-3.
Hobbes, Thomas, s. Edw., of Stogursey, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 July, 1679, aged 16.

Brydges, William, s. Marshall, of Tiberton, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 March, 1680-1, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1688, serjt.-at-law 1716, died in 1736, brother of Francis and Marshall. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Dayrell, Thomas, s. Anthony, of Lillingstone Dayrell, Bucks, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1680, aged 16; of the Middle Temple 1662, died unmarried, buried at Lillingstone Dayrell, 10 Aug., 1685. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Chilcot, William, s. Rob., of Exeter, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1680, aged 16; B.A. 1683, M.A. 1686, rector of Denbury, Devon, 1689. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus; Rawlinson, iii. 169; Gutch MS., 371.

Lugg, Adam, s. James, of Tiverton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 July, 1680, aged 16; B.A. 1684, M.A. 1687, proctor 1691, rector of Brattleby and of Fillingham, co. Lincoln, 1697. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Potter, Sampson, s. Edw., of Oxford (city), gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1680-1, aged 15; B.A. 1684, M.A. 1688; died 26 Jan., 1699, aged 35; M.I. St. Peter-in-the-East, Oxford. See Hearne, i. 135.
Pember, Benjamin, s. Fr., of Newport, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 April, 1680, aged 16; student of Gray's Inn 1682; brother of Francis and Thomas 1673. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Birch, James, s. William, of Milson, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 17; B.A. 21 Feb., 1683-4, vicar of Mamble, co. Worcester, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Ames, Richard, s. William, of Wendham, Salop, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 July, 1680, aged 18; B.A. 1684, rector of Cresswell, co. Stafford, 1693. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Greaves, Thomas, s. Sam., of Seaston (Sifton), Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 16; B.A. 1683; perhaps brother of Richard 1670.
Harris, John, s. Tho., of Newbottle, Northants, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 March, 1680-1, aged 17; B.A. 1684; brother of Thomas 1679.
Holmes, Jonas, s. Jo., of Exburn, Devon, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1680, aged 18; B.A. from Magdalen Hall 1684.
Holcombe, Charles, s. Nic., of St. Decuman, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1680-1, aged 16; B.A. 1684.
Powlett, William (Pawlett), s. William, of Bicton, Hants, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 17.
Jennings, Abraham, s. Rob., of Hanley, co. Worcester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 March, 1680-1, aged 18.
Smith, Francis (Smyth), s. Rob., of Burton, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 17.
Towills, Arthur, s. Geo., of Charlinch, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1680-1, aged 21.
Mansell, Edward, s. Tho., of Cardington, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1680-1, aged 17.
Sparrow, Anthony, s. A., of Burford, Oxon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 May, 1680, aged 17.
Powys, Robert, s. Th., of Henley, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 July, 1680, aged 17.

Shewring, Thomas, s. Th., of Colerne, Wilts, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1681, aged 17; B.A. 1685, M.A. 1688; rector of St. Ebbe, Oxford, 1690, vicar of Bicester, Oxon, 1691, rector of Crudwell, 1695, and vicar of Hankerton, Wilts, 1699-1717; father of the next. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Cupper, John, s. William, of Easton, co. Hereford, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 March, 1681-2, aged 18; B.A. 1685, perhaps rector of Neenton, Salop, 1715. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Jones, William, s. Edw., of 'Comony,' co. Montgom., paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 July, 1681, aged 17; one of these names vicar of Llangirrig, co. Montgomery, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Fenton, Charles, s. Ralph, of Ludlow, Salop, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 July, 1681, aged 17; vicar of Felton, co. Hereford, 1689, rector of Ludlow 1702. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Finimore, James, s. J., of Tiverton, Devon, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1681, aged 16; B.A. 1685, M.A. 1689, vicar of Odiham, Hants, 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Clent, Thomas, s. Littleton, of Knightwyke, co. Worcester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 5 July, 1681, aged 17; of the Middle Temple 1682. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Sayer, John, s. Franc., of Yattenden, Berks, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 Jan., 1681-2, aged 16; brother of Philip 1685.
Sage, Adam, s. Geo., of South Moulton, Devon, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1681, aged 17.
Dale, Richard, s. John, of Norton, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1681, aged 19.
Radford, John, s. J., of Oakford, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1681, aged 17.

Brent, Charles, s. James, of Ashton Keynes, co. Gloucester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 Nov., 1682, aged 14; B.A. 1687, M.A. 1 March, 1691-2, rector of St. Werburg, Bristol, 1691, and of Christ Church, Bristol, 1693, preb. of St. David's 1707, and canon residentiary 1715-16, died at Bristol 10 June, 1729, buried in chancel of Christ Church. See Rawlinson, iii. 1; xvi. 306; & Hearne, ii. 6.

Brydges, Marshall, s. Marshall, of Tiberton, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1682, aged 16, B.A. 1686; fellow All Soul's Coll., M.A. 1690, canon of Wells 1695, and chancellor 1696, vicar of St. Decuman, Somerset, 1696, and of Croscombe 1713-22, rector of Poulshot, Wilts, 1723-8, brother of Francis and William, 1681. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Hanbury, William, elder son of Thomas, of Hardmead, Bucks, equitis. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1682-3, aged 17, of Little Marcle, co. Hereford; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1689 (his father as of Little Marcle); died 19 Oct., 1737; brother of Thomas 1686. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Dobbins, Robert (Dobyns), s. R(obert), of Evesbatch, co. Hereford (Esbiche, Hants), gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 May, 1682, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1690, his father also a barrister 1676, father of Robert 1714. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Hillman, John, s. J., of Kynfare, co. Stafford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 17, B.A. 1685; M.A. from Sydney Sussex Coll., Cambridge, 1690, vicar of Stithians 1706, and rector of St. Michael Penkeville, Cornwall, 1707; brother of James 1693.
Hanbury, Thomas, s. Jon(as), of Droitwich, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1682-3, aged 18; B.A. 1686, rector of Little Marcle, co. Hereford, 1688-1722. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Delahay, John, s. Thos., of Peterchurch, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1682-3, aged 17; rector of Great Greenford, Middlesex, 1689. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Nethway, Richard (Neathway), s. John, of Defford, co. Worcester, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 March, 1682-3, aged 18.
Thomas, Humphrey, s. Edm., of Michael-Church, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 March, 1682-3, aged 17.
Wright, Bernard, s. B., of Basingstoke, Hants, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 Oct., 1682, aged 16.

Vaughan, Meredith, s. Owen, of "Conytythur," co. Radnor, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 21 March, 1683-4, aged 18; B.A. from Merton Coll. 1687, M.A. 16 March, 1690-1; vicar of Duns Tew, Oxon, 1690; father of William 1712. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Wither, Andrew, s. William, of Waltham, Hants, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 Dec., 1683, aged 18; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1693, treasurer 1733; died 31 March, 1752; perhaps brother of Charles 1680. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Seymore, Anthony, s. Dan., of Walford, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1683-4, aged 17; rector of Llanvihangel-juxta-Usk, co. Monmouth, 1696, and vicar of Stokesay, Salop, 1727-34. See Foster's Index Eccl.
T(h)ompson, Charles, s. Joh., of Madeley, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4, aged 18; studied physic; died at Madeley 9 Dec., 1748. See Rawl. vi. 352.
Stone, Robert, s. Walter, of Williton, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 March, 1683-4, aged 17, B.A. 1687; vicar of Minehead, Somerset, 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Aldrich, Henry, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 May, 1683, B.A. 1 Feb., 1686-7; one of these names rector of Darley, co. Derby, 1691. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Strode, Thomas, s. Thomas, of Wincanton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1683, aged 18; student of Lincoln's Inn 1683. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Gunter, Thomas, s. John, of Talgarth, co. Brecon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 May, 1683, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1685. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Price, Hugh, s. Joh., of Pembridge, co. Hereford, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 March, 1683-4, aged 16, B.A. 1688; M.A. from New Inn Hall 1692.
Cleland, Richard, s. Tho., of Ashbrenton, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 18; B.A. from Hart Hall 2 March, 1687-8.
Spurway, John, s. William, of Oakford, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 March, 1683, aged 17, exhibitioner 1643, fellow 1644-8.
Winde, Henry, of Balliol Coll., paup.; matric. 11 May, 1683, B.A. 1687; rector of Twinstead, Essex, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, William, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 July, 1683; B.A. from St. John's Coll. 1688, M.A. 11 Feb., 1689-90.
Granger, William, s. William, of Milverton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 July, 1683, aged 19.
Cox, William, s. William, of Ninehed, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 March, 1683, aged 24.
Durston, William, s. William, of Plymouth, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1683, aged 16.
Scobell, Ellize, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1683, Christian name "Ethre" in Mat. Reg.
Cotton, Bernard, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1683; subs. more like ' Coffon.'
Jenkes, Henry, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 May, 1683; B.A. from New Inn Hall 1687.
Rands, Henry, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 July, 1683; B.A. 1687.

Pincke, Henry, s. Th., of Winslade, Hants, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1684, aged 15; B.A. 1688, M.A. 1691, incorporated at Cambridge 1693, student of Gray's Inn 1686, rector of Eastrop, Hants, 1696, vicar of Damerham, Wilts, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Gray's Inn Reg.

Veryard, Andrew, s. A., of St. Decumans, Somerset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 June, 1684, aged 17, B.A. 1688; rector of Withycombe, Somerset, 1691, and of Blackborough or All Hallows, Devon, 1696. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Hoskyns, Philip, s. Joh., of Langarran, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 Nov., 1684, aged 16; of Bernithan in Llangarran, and of London 1738; student of Middle Temple 1685. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Mytton, Thomas (Mitton), s. H(enry), of Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1684-5, aged 15; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1696; brother of Henry 1672. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Turberville, Fortescue, s. John, of Tolland, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 Oct., 1684, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1692. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Blake, Peter, s. Peter, of Andover, co. Southampton, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 July, 1684, aged 16; student of the Middle Temple 1683. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Price, James, s. James, of Glascombe, co. Radnor, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 Feb., 1684-5, aged 17; B.A. 1688.
Churchey, James Laurence, s. James, of Abbas Milton, Dorset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1684, aged 17.
Morgan, Henry, s. Joh., of Crickhowell, co. Brecon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 March, 1684-5, aged 21.
Vaughan, Godwyn, s. Tho., of Goodrich, co. Hereford, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 June, 1684, aged 17.
Baldwin, John, s. Ric., of Munslow, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1684-5, aged 17.
Gorton, Thomas, s. John, of "Hals," Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 April, 1684, aged 18.
Head, Thomas, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 April, 1684.

Fletcher, Thomas, s. Jo., of Winchester, Hants. pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 April, 1685, aged 18; fellow New Coll., B.A. 1689, M.A. 14 Jan., 1692-3, B. and D.D. 1707, 2nd master and after fellow of Winchester college, served the donative of Fairfield, Somerset, 1694, and prebendary of Wells 1696; died 1713; father of Thomas, bishop of Kildare, 1745-61, and of Philip and William, both deans of Kildare. See Ath. iv. 559; Fasti, ii. 406; Foster's Index Eccl.; Hearne, i. 291; Rawl. iv. 277, xvii. 120; Gent's. Mag. 1780, 123; & D.N.B.

Hatheway, John s. J, of Wicken, Northants, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 March, 1685-6, aged 19; B.A. 1689, minister of Horndon-on-the-Hill, Essex; licenced 23 June, 1596, to marry Susanna Bickford, of St. James's. Clerkenwell; vicar of Egloshayle, Cornwall, 1709-30. See Foster's Index Eccl. & London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster.

Bridges, William, s. William, of Dymoke, co. Gloucester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1685, aged 18; student of the Middle Temple 1687, as son and heir of William, of Colwall, co. Hereford. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Newte, Henry, s. Rich., of Tiverton, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 27 Oct., 1685, aged 17; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 1689, M.A. 1693, B.D. 14 Jan., 1702-3, student of Inner Temple 1686. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Fortescue, Roger, s. William, of Buckland Filleigh, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 April, 1685, aged 19; student of Inner Temple 1686; perhaps buried in Temple church 24 June, 1688. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Baker, James, s. Thomas, of Bishops Nympton, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1685-6, aged 17; B.A. 1689, vicar of Kilmersdon and rector of Babington, Somerset, 1691. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Michell, William, s. William, of Porlock, Somerset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 March, 1685-6, aged 19; B.A. 1689, vicar of Creech St. Michael, Somerset, 1696; brother of Charles 1698, and of Robert 1689.
Hyde, Arthur, s. Laurence, of Winchester, co. Southants, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 July, 1685, aged 18; student of Middle Temple 1686; father of Laurence 1714. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Payne, John (Paine), s. J., of Uplowman, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1685-6, aged 17; B.A. 1689, M.A. 1692, rector of East Quantoxhead, Somerset, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Foster, William, s. William, of Strickland, Dorset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 12 March, 1685-6, aged 17; B.A. 1689, M.A. 1692, rector of Hampreston, Dorset, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lutterell, Thomas, s. T., of Carhampton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1685, aged 17, B.A. 1689; fellow All Souls' Coll., M.A. 1693, B. Med. 1703. See Alumni West. 199.
Raynsford, Edmund (Rainsford), s. Tho., of Bodenham, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1685, aged 16, B.A. 7 March, 1688-9; M.A. from St. Alban Hall 29 Jan., 1691-2.
Finney, Samuel, s. S(amuel), of Exborn, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 April, 1685, aged 19, B.A. 1688, rector of Exbourne 1690-6. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Turner, John, s. William, of Taunton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 27 Oct., 1685, aged 17, student of Inner Temple 1688. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Halpenny, Bernard, s. Tho., of Lilly, Herts, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 Nov., 1685, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1687. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Webb, John, s. Joh., of Burwash, Sussex, gent. (subs. "minister"). Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1685, aged 17; his father vicar of Burwash, 1662.
Chishull, John, s. J., of Halberton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1685-6, aged 19, for one of these names see Calamy, ii. 80.
Humphreys, Charles, s. Rd., of Newtown, co. Montgomery, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1685, aged 18; B. & D.C.L. 1714.
Sherwood, John, s. Rich., of Sutton, co. "Brex" (? Berks), pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 April, 1685, aged 18, B.A. 1688.
Jennings, Edward, s. Rob., of Hanley, co. Worcester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 April, 1685, aged 19.
Woodcock, Josias, s. J., of Taunton, Somerset, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1685-6, aged 20.
Northleigh, James, s. J., of Colebrook, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 April, 1685, aged 19.
Yeo, Robert, s. William, of Merton, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1685-6, aged 17.
Pennell, Thomas, s. Th., of Cleobury, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1685, aged 16.
Hayward, Thomas, of New Sarum, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1685-6, aged 15.
Crudge, Richard, s. H., pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1685-6, aged 19.
Humphreys, Arthur, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1685, aged 16.

Baron, John, s. J., of Henley, co. Worcester, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 May, 1686, aged 16; B.A. 1 March, 1689-90, M.A. 1692, B.D. 1700, D.D. 8 Feb., 1704-5, master 1705-22, vice-chancellor 171518, preb. of Bristol 1713, rector of Heath, Oxon, 1713, died in college 20 Jan., 1721-2, his will proved at Oxford 26 Feb., 1721-2. See Hearne, i. 134; Rawlinson, iv. 193; Gutch, i. 103; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Hanbury, Thomas, 2s. Thomas, of Little Marcle, co. Hereford, equitis. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 May, 1686, aged 15; one Thomas Hanbury, of Balliol, died 27 Feb., 1734-5, in Queen's Square, Westminster, buried in St. George's-in-the-Fields 4 March. See Rawl. ii. 241; called Dr. Hanbury, a physician, in Gent's. Mag. Brother of William 1683.

Edwards, William, s. William, of Tretire, co. Hereford, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 Oct., 1686, aged 18; one of these names vicar of Sellack 1691, and rector of Humber, co. Hereford, 1697, etc.; (his father rector of Tretire, 1664); brother of Philip 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Hoskyns, Charles, s. John, of Llangarron, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Feb., 1686-7, aged 16; B.A. from New Inn Hall 9 March, 1690-1, M.A. 1693, vicar of Longhope, co. Gloucester, 1700, and of Linton with Lea, co. Hereford, 1703. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Blake, Nathaniel, s. Humphrey, of Stowey, Somerset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 March, 1686-7, aged 17; B.A. 1690, M.A. 1693, rector of Harborough, co. Warwick, 1704, died 11 June, 1712. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Rawlinson, iv. 234.

Collins, Samuel, s. S(amuel), of Maperton, Somerset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 March, 1686-7, aged 16; B. A. 1690, rector of Binegar, Somerset, 1696-1723, his father instituted to Maperton 1667. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Brewer, Nathaniel, s. William, of Trowbridge, Wilts, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1686-7, aged 18; one of these names B.A. from St. John's Coll., Cambridge, 1690, and vicar of Keevil, Wilts, 1702-35.
Brewster, Samuel, s. S., of London, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 May, 1686, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1700. See Rawlinson, vi. 235; & Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Davis, William, s. Phil., of Hendrey, co. Hereford, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 18; vicar of Ganarew, co. Hereford, 1695. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Prideaux, Richard, s. Jonath., of Sutcombe, Devon, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 March, 1686-7, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1694. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Newham, Ralph, s. Joh., of East Grimstead, Wilts, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 May, 1686, aged 18; B.A. 11 Feb., 1689-90, fellow, M.A. 1692; admon. at Oxford 5 Feb., 1700.
Barrett, John. s. George, of Oxford (city), pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 17; B.A. 1689, M.A. 1693. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Fortescue, George, s. William, of Buckland Filleigh, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 March, 1686-7, aged 18; of Tavistock, ancestor of Inglett-Fortescue.
Martin, James, s. William, of Warwick (town), cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 March, 1686-7, aged 16.

Gibson, Thomas, s. Th., of Flatbury, co. Worcester, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 11 July, 1687, aged 15; B.A. from Oriel Coll. 1691, vicar of Broadway, co. Worcester, 1693-6, and of Flyford Flavell 1696-1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Vernon, Robert, s. Joh., of Martley, co. Worcester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 May, 1687, aged 18, B.A. 21 Feb., 1690-1, M.A. 1 March, 1693-4; rector of Martley 1710-43; brother of John 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lyne, John, s. Fish, of Oxford (city), paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 6 July, 1687, aged 17; B.A. 1691, M.A. 1 March, 1693-4, vicar of Brixworth, Northants, 1704, and rector of Lamport 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Elford, Walter, s. Francis, of "Pelmoton D Mar" (? Honiton or Silverton St. Mary), Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 June, 1687, aged 17; B.A. 1691, M.A. 8 March, 1693-4; perhaps father of the next.

Russell, Richard, s. Tho., of Cardington, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 June, 1687, aged 18; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 1691; perhaps vicar of Holmer, co. Hereford, 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Newn(h)am, Henry, s. H. of Longville, Salop. Balliol Coll., matric. 25 June, 1687, aged 16; B.A. 1691, M.A. 1723 (Cat. Grads.), rector of Hope Bowdler, Salop, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Stephens, Edward, s. Tho., of Sadbury, co. Gloucester, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 April, 1687, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1688. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lynche, John, s. James, of New Sarum, Wilts, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 March, 1687-8, aged 16; student of Middle Temple, 1690. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Newbolt, William (Nuboult), s. Edm., of Berkhampstead, Herts, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 April, 1687, aged 15; B.A. 21 Feb., 1690-1.
Binford, James, s. William, of Williton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 March, 1687-8, aged 17; B.A. 1691, M.A. 1694.
Verney, Compton, s. Richard (1650), of Kingston, co. Warwick, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 May, 1687, aged 17; died s.p.
Anderson, William, s. William, of Stirling, 'Scoti,' pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 March, 1687-8, aged 22.
Williams, John, s. J., of Tiverton, Devon, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 June, 1687, aged 18.
Alexander, John, s. J., of 'Scoti,' gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 Dec., 1687, aged 22.

Carter, Richard, s. R(ichard), of Oxford (city), pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 July, 1688, aged 15; of Chilton, Bucks, bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1698, bencher 1721, treasurer 1733, justice of Anglesey, etc., 1720, chief justice of Glamorgan, Brecon, and Radnor 1721, buried at Chilton June, 1755, aged 83. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Gregory, Richard, s. John, of Arle, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 March, 1688-9, aged 15, B.A. 1692; incorporated at Cambridge 1719, LL.B. from Magdalen Coll. 1719, rector of Broadway, co. Worcester, 1696, vicar of Child's Wickham, co. Gloucester, 1700, and rector of Willersey 1701. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Dashwood, William, s. Robt., of Stogumber, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 15, B.A. 1694; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1710, rector of Little Thurrock, Essex, 1697, and vicar of West Thurrock 1710, rector of Enborne, Berks, 1718. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Lutwyche, Edward, s. E(dward), of Easthope, Salop, eq. aur. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 July, 1688, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1684, as son and heir of Edward, late of Gray's Inn, serjt.at-law (who was knighted 14 Nov., 1684); brother of Thomas 1692. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Hunt, George, s. Richd., of Chedworth, co. Gloucester, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 Nov., 1688, aged 17; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1692, M.A. 1697, vicar of Coln St. Aldwyn, co. Gloucester, 1704, rector of Quennington, co. Gloucester, 1710. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Byrom, Thomas, s. Thomas, of London, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 17; fellow Merton Coll. 1693, B.A. 1692, M.A. 1697, B.Med. 1698, D.Med. 1702, admon. (at Oxford), granted 17 July, 1704. See O.H.S., iv. 299.

Geers, Timothy, s. Thomas, of Hatfield, co. "Her," arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1688-9, aged 15; student of Lincoln's, Inn 1699; his father of the city of Hereford, serjeant-at-law. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Bulgin, James, s. Elias, of Wincanton, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 March, 1688-9, aged 18; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1692, vicar of Holcombe Rogus, Devon, 1693. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Karver, Henry, s. John, of Hereford parva, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 17; B.A. 1691, M.A. 1694, rector of Little Packington, co. Warwick, 1695. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Orlton, Griffin, s. Hugh, of Norton, co. Radnor, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 April, 1688, aged 17; B.A. 1691, vicar of Llangunllo 1717, and rector of Whitton, Radnor, 1718. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gawler, John, s. J(ohn), of Sampford, Devon, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 May, 1688, aged 18; B.A. 1692, rector of Chaffcombe, Somerset, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Sully, John, s. William, of Crocombe, Somerset, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 July, 1688, aged 18, B.A. 1692; rector of Crocombe 1697. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Fitz Maurice, William, born in London, s. William, Baron of Kerry. Balliol Coll., matric. 13 July, 1688, aged 17; of Gallane, co. Kerry, and a lieutcolonel.
Michell, Robert, s. William, of Porlock, Somerset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 27 Feb., 1688-9, aged 15; brother of Charles 1698, and of William 1686.
Sampson, Samuel, s. Joh., of Bruham, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 March, 1688-9, aged 19; B.A. from Christ Church 1693. See John 1669.
Dowden, Thomas, s. Joh., of Stogursey, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 Nov., 1688, aged 19; B.A. 1692, M.A. 1695.
Roberts, Cocks, s. William, of Alstone, co. Gloucester, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 March, 1688-9, aged 15.
Hawkins, William s. William, of Strathfieldsay, Southants, pp. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 20.
Melton, Edward, s. E., of Bampton, Devon, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 15; B.A. 1692.
Page, Benjamin, s. B., of Weston, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 8 March, 1688-9, aged 17.
Smith, Richard, s. Tho., of Sutton, Berks, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Nov., 1688, aged 17.
Parkes, John, s. J., of Aston, Berks, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 14 July, 1688, aged 14.
Nourse, John, s. J(ohn), of Weston, co. Hereford, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 June, 1689, aged 15; student of Middle Temple 1683; father of John 1713. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Slowly, David, s. Joh., of Porlock, Somerset, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 10 Oct., 1689, aged 15, B.A. 1693; vicar of Middlezoy, Somerset, 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Everard, Robert, s. John, of Spaxton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 May, 1689, aged 18; student of Lincoln's Inn 1691. See Foster's Inns of Court Register.
Shapcote, John, s. Ph., of Knowstone, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. entry 9 July, 1689, aged 14, B.A. 1693, M.A. 1696, B.Med. 1700, D.Med. 1702.
Lawley, Lewis, s. George, of Woburn, Beds, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 30 May, 1689, aged 16. B.A. 1693.
Topp, Andrew, s. Jo., of Melton Abbas, Dorset, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 20 March, 1689-90, aged 18.
Shapcote, Philip, s. Ph., of Knowstone, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 July, 1689, aged 15.

Milles, Jeremiah, s. 1s., of Hants, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 2 May, 1690, aged 15; B.A. 17 Feb., 1693-4, M.A. 1697, fellow 1696, and tutor till 1705, rector of Riseholm, co. Lincoln, 1704, and vicar of Duloe, Cornwall, 1704-46. See Rawl. xxi. 39; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Whit(e)locke, Elston, s. Jo., of Warkleigh, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 April, 1690, aged 17; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 1694, M.A. 1696; vicar of Old Cleeve, Somerset, 1698, rector of Stoke Rivers 1703, and of Langtree, (both) Devon, 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Goodinge, Devereux, s. Th(omas), of London, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 March, 1690-1, aged 18; B.A. 1702, student of Gray's Inn 1690, rector of Stowe Nine Churches, Northants, 1712, and of Fawley, Bucks, 1716. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.

Mason, Edward, s. T., of co, Monmouth, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1690, aged 17, B.A. 1694; M.A. from Christ's Coll., Cambridge, 1698, rector of Hampton Bishop, co. Hereford, 1698, and of Bromyard (3rd portion), 1700. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Pitt, Edward, s. G., of Stratfieldsaye, Southants, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 24 Feb., 1690-1, aged 15; student of Inner Temple 1691, as youngest son of George; brother of George 1680, and of John 1690. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Pitt, John, s. Joh., of Stratfieldsaye, Hants, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1690, aged 17; student of Inner Temple 1693 (as son of George); brother of Edward 1691, and of George 1680. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Pugh, Thomas, s. Tho., of Presteign, co. Radnor, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 March, 1690, aged 15; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1693, M.A. 1695; perhaps vicar of Brookthorpe, co. Gloucester, 1700. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Sefton, John, s. T., of Bignell, Sussex, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1690, aged 16; B.A. from St. Mary Hall, 1695; vicar of Heathfield, Sussex, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Pengelly, James, s. Jo., of St. Peter Tavy, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 March, 1690-1; B.A. 1694, M.A. 1697, (incorporated at Cambridge, 1698), B.Med. 1700, as Jacob.
Sone, Philip, s. J., of Empshott, Hants, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1690, aged 19, B.A. 19 March, 1695-6; rector of Moresbread, Hants, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Smalman, Henry, s. Tho., of Neenton, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 28 March, 1690, aged 17; student of Inner Temple 1691. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Theed, John, s. Joh., of Horton, Bucks, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1690, aged 17; student of Inner Temple 1690. See Foster's Inns of Court Register.
Tynte, Halswell, s. H., of Goathurst, Somerset, bart. Balliol Coll. matric. 19 July, 1690, aged 15; died before 1702; brother of Fortescue and John 1703.
Massy, Samuel, s. Hugh, of Duntrileague, co. Louth, (Dauntry League, co. Lincoln), p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1690, aged 24; died s.p.
Tynte, Fortescue, s. H., of Goathurst, Somerset, bart. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 July, 1690, aged 14; brother of Halswell 1690, and John 1703.
Cole, Sheldon, s. Phil., of Ludlow, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 7 April, 1690, aged 16; B.A. 1693, M.A. 1696, brother of Philip 1702.
Mildmay, Halliday, s. Hen., of Twyford, Hants, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1690, aged 15, of Shawford, Hants.
Anderson, Richard, s. Henr., of Kings Somborne, Hants, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 26 June, 1690, aged 18.
Dismarits, Isaac, s. 1s., of Middlesex, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 9 April, 1690, aged 18; B.A. 1693.
Dangar, Richard, s. R., of Bromfield, Somerset, p.p. Balliol Coll., matric. 19 July, 1690, aged 19.
Cheeke, Edward, s. Edw., of Exeter, arm. Balliol Coll., matric. 22 May, 1690, aged 15.

Kettilby, Abel, s. Edw., of Bolton, co. Worcester, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 1 July, 1691, aged 15; of Bitterley, near Ludlow, Salop, gent., bar.at-law, Middle Temple, 1699, treasurer 1735 (his father of Ludlow, Salop, gent.), made a Landgrave of Carolina by Queen Anne, M.P. Ludlow 1722-7; died 5 Dec., 1744; brother of Timothy. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Usgate, John, s. T., of Hungerford, Salop, pleb. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 March, 1691, aged 18; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 19 Feb., 1694-5; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1732; rector of Silvington, Salop, 1696, vicar of West Wycombe, Bucks, 1715, and rector of Little Thurrock, Essex, 1718. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Edwards, Thomas, s. Th., of Bristol, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1691, aged 18; B.C.L. from Hart Hall 1698, bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1698, bencher 1724, M.P. Bristol 1713-14, Dec. 1719 until unseated March, 1735; brother of Wm. 1703. See Foster's Judges and Barristers & Parliamentary Dictionary.

Monnox, Richard, s. R., of Overwood, Salop, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 March, 1691-2, aged 17; B.A. 1695, fellow, M.A. 1698, B.D. 1718, vicar of Culham, Oxon, 1705, and rector of Tendring, Essex, 1720; admon. at Oxford 21 June, 1721, and 29 Jan., 1724. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Kirkham, Lionell, s. H., of Stanton, co. Gloucester, gent. (subs. "clerici"). Balliol Coll., matric. 11 March, 1691-2, aged 16; B.A. 1695, rector of Stanton-with-Snowhill 1700, vicar of Northleach, co. Gloucester, 1702; brother of Henry 1676. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Marsh, George, s. J., of Milton Abbas, Dorset, cler. Balliol Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1691, aged 16, B.A. 1695; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1706, vicar of Milton Abbas 1700, rector of Athelhampton, Dorset, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Gale, Thomas, s. T., of Taunton, Somerset, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 March, 1691, aged 15; B.A. 1694, M.A. 26 Feb., 1697-8, vicar of Taunton St. Mary Magdalen, 1703, rector of Angersleigh, Somerset, 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Aubrey, Reginald, s. Herb., of Hereford (city), gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 March, 1691, aged 15; B.A. 1694, M.A. 1697, vicar of Foy, co. Hereford, 1698, rector of Brampton Abbots 1713. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Deane, John, s. J., of Bristol, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1691, aged 16; B.A. 1695, M.A. 1698, vicar of Tibberton 1700, and of Kempsey, co. Worcester, 1707. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Harel, Charles, s. Christian, of London, Middlesex, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 23 May, 1691, aged 16; B.A. 1695, bar.-at-law, of Middle Temple, 1703, bencher 1728. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Hotchkiss, Thomas, s. W., of Ditton, Salop, paup. Balliol Coll., matric. 3 March, 1691-2, aged 17; B.A. 1695, M.A. 1698, vicar of Eaton, Salop, 1701, and of Munslow 1703. See Foster's Index Eccl.
French, Richard, s. James, of Cove of Cork, Ireland, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 4 July, 1691, aged 15; student of Middle Temple 1697. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Spiring, John, s. Ro., of Topsham, Devon, gent. Balliol Coll., matric. 31 March, 1691, aged 15, B.A. 1694; vicar of Burlescombe, Devon, 1701. See Foster's Index Eccl.
